rawConfig.title: Raw Configuration
rawConfig.subtitle: View and edit the full Caddy JSON configuration.
rawConfig.jsonDescription: Edit the configuration below and click "Apply" to load it via POST /load.
rawConfig.diffDescription: Left (editable): current config. Right (read-only): converted from Caddyfile.

adminWarning.title: Admin API configuration changed
adminWarning.description: Modifying the admin section may cause this UI to lose connectivity. If you change the admin listen address or disable the API, the panel will not be able to communicate with Caddy until the configuration is corrected manually.

rawConfig.importError: Failed to import: invalid JSON file

globalConfig.title: Global Configuration
globalConfig.subtitle: Configure admin API, logging, storage, and other global settings.
globalConfig.comingSoonDescription: This feature is planned for a future release.
